# B02: Commitments

## V's Commitments

### C-1: Left Lane Analysis Package
**To:** Nico (Left Lane Capital)  
**Deadline:** Morning of Feb 19  
**Details:** Create Left Lane account, run VC analyst role scan against full Careerspan pool, package top candidates with analysis quality demonstration, send to Nico  

### C-2: Left Lane Portfolio Cluster Analysis
**To:** Shivam / Internal  
**Deadline:** Tonight (Feb 18)  
**Details:** Scrape Left Lane portfolio jobs, isolate founding engineer roles, run cluster analysis on most common skills/traits, use results to define synthetic talent pool archetypes  

### C-3: Cobalt ID Follow-Up
**To:** Priya (Cobalt ID)  
**Deadline:** When she responds  
**Details:** Set up a 3-way call with V, Shivam, and Priya to discuss engineering hiring needs  

### C-4: Emory Follow-Up
**To:** Emory contact  
**Deadline:** This week  
**Details:** Follow up on campus distribution / Wise Hearts program launch  

### C-5: Sync with Shivam
**To:** Shivam  
**Deadline:** Feb 19 afternoon  
**Details:** Sync call to compare progress on all fronts  

### C-6: In-Person Meeting
**To:** Shivam  
**Deadline:** Before March 1  
**Details:** Meet in person in NYC  

## Shivam's Commitments

### C-7: Brex Pitch
**To:** Brex contacts  
**Deadline:** Feb 19  
**Details:** Talk to Brex about talent pipeline as a founder perk or Shortlist-style differentiated event concept  

### C-8: Cobalt ID Candidate Sourcing
**To:** V / Priya  
**Deadline:** After V confirms scope  
**Details:** Look into Cobalt ID, assess engineering needs, potentially source India-based candidates. Two models to propose: direct full-time hire or contract model with managed team  

### C-9: Social Distribution of Left Lane Role
**To:** V / Left Lane  
**Deadline:** After V generates apply link and confirms stealth/brand approach  
**Details:** Promote the role across Instagram story and personal channels to drive candidate flow  

### C-10: Sync Tomorrow
**To:** V  
**Deadline:** Feb 19 afternoon  
**Details:** Catch up on progress across all fronts
